_comment: RESEARCH-026 casual fixture — generated by scripts/ab-harness/naturalize-fixture.py applying rules P1–P5 to the source fixture. Rule definitions in docs/eval/RESEARCH-026-naturalization-pilot.md. P4/P6 (content + gotcha-trigger preservation) are enforced by rule-scoping — no rule targets paths, tool names, numbers, or conditional-chain structure. Spot-check recommended per preregistration validation gate.
